response:
| Pros of Remote Work | Cons of Remote Work |
|---------------------|---------------------|
| **Eliminates daily commute** – Saves time, reduces transportation costs, and lowers daily stress. | **Social isolation** – Lack of in-person interaction can lead to loneliness and weakened team cohesion. |
| **Greater flexibility** – Employees can often customize their schedules and work from preferred locations. | **Blurred work-life boundaries** – Difficulty "switching off" can lead to overwork, longer hours, and burnout. |
| **Improved work-life balance** – More time and energy for family, health, and personal responsibilities. | **Communication & collaboration challenges** – Reliance on digital tools and time zone differences can slow decision-making and reduce spontaneous teamwork. |
